stemHtml: What may the impacts of excessive exposure to radiation (such as solar radiation) be?

options.a: It increases the temperature in the flight crew compartment, causing an increase in stress levels, and resulting in decreased performance.
options.b: It increases radiation absorption by the skin, stimulating the release of melatonin and darken your skin colour permanently.
options.c: It may disrupt your circadian rhythm, thus disrupting your sleep pattern, leading to excessive fatigue during the flight.
options.d: It may have a detrimental effect on your central nervous system, damage your internal organs, and cause skin cancer.
